message:
🐛 fix: correct sorting/filtering in events and Helm history cards (#8529)

Replace index-based React keys with stable identity keys derived from
item properties (cluster, namespace, object, reason, timestamp, revision).
Index keys cause React to reuse DOM nodes for wrong items after re-sort,
producing visual mismatches between displayed data and actual list order.

Wrap useCardSort's sort computation in useMemo so the sorted array
reference is stable across renders and only recomputes when inputs
(items, sortBy, sortDirection) actually change. Guard against undefined
arrays with (items || []).

Fixes #8520, Fixes #8521, Fixes #8522

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
